comment: Configuration for run-schemathesis.sh. Schemathesis reads CLI flags primarily; this file documents the desired check set + hypothesis tuning so the run is reproducible. The script passes -c all on the command line which overrides per-check toggles below — flip the script's -c flag if you want to honor this file's selection.
notes: max_examples=100 is a tradeoff between fuzz coverage and CI runtime. Bump to 500+ for nightly runs.
deadline=5000ms allows for slow mock-server cold starts. Reduce once the mock is warm.
derandomize=false keeps the test stochastic; set to true if you need reproducible failures during triage.
workers=1 keeps output linear; raise for faster runs once the mock server tolerates concurrent fuzz.
